'''Algarine''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Algara II]]. It was located on the continent of [[Kreesis]]. Several corporations had branches in Algarine, including [[Algar Mining]], [[Feduch Importers]], [[Prosperine Entertainment and Distilleries]], and [[Kexeerian Blasters Technology]].

{{City-stub}}
